## Professional Summary
Product Designer specializing in data-driven enterprise tools. Uses a unique "story-data" methodology that combines narrative-driven design thinking with quantitative user research to create intuitive, scalable products for complex business environments.

## Design Philosophy
The "story-data approach" bridges qualitative storytelling with quantitative data analysis. Every design decision is backed by both user stories and measurable metrics, ensuring products are both emotionally resonant and objectively effective.

## Core Competencies
- Enterprise UX Design
- Data-Driven Design Systems
- Design Token Architecture
- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- User Research (Qualitative & Quantitative)
- Interaction Design
- Visual Design & Branding
- Design Operations
- Prototyping & Validation
- Accessibility & Inclusive Design
- Cross-functional Leadership

## Tools & Technologies
- Design: Figma (advanced), Framer, Adobe Creative Suite, Webflow, ProtoPie
- Prototyping: ProtoPie, Principle, Origami
- Development Knowledge: HTML, CSS, Javascript, Webflow,  React, Tailwind CSS, Design-to-Code workflows
- Collaboration: Notion, Linear, Slack, Jira
- Analytics: Hotjar, Mixpanel, Google Analytics

## Industries Served
- Telecommunications (Telkom Indonesia)
- Energy (Pertamina)
- SaaS & Enterprise Software
- Sports Media (TAPPP)

- Creative & Media

## Clients & Affiliations
- **PT Neuronworks Indonesia**: Standardized UI/UX Design System and built the UI/UX for SCONE and Proovia (serving 200,000+ government employees).
- **TAPPP**: Designed fintech and payment dashboard systems.
- **BuildWithAngga (BWA)**: Collaborated as UI/UX specialist/instructor.
- **The Catalyst Team (Catalyst Team / CTC)**: Founder and design collaborator.
- **Upwork & Contra**: Vetted independent freelancer for global clients.
- Other notable clients: Nextiva, AMPD, Uniqloop, MTLab, Wzard Inc., OneEV, Kangamoon, Arumaya, Tanpakoding, Amigos Group Indonesia.

- **Certified in UX Research & Strategy**
- **Design Systems & Design Tokens specialization**
- **Product Management fundamentals**

## Notable Achievements
- Built enterprise design systems serving 10M+ users at Indonesia's largest telecom.
- Created data-driven design methodology adopted across multiple SaaS platforms.
- Designed products spanning B2B, B2C, and internal enterprise tools.
- Led design for products in highly regulated industries (energy, telecom, fintech).
